_comment: Coverage-gap decks: every assigned uncovered card appears in >=1 coherent realistic deck.

decks.label: Earth/Fire Brace Bulwark (warrior)
decks.notes: Stonepacer (t3-agility-earth-earth) is the cheap 1s vit/haste opener; Slag Maul (t3-attack-earth-fire) is the big single-target burn-attack win-con; Magmavow (t3-counter-earth-fire) is the Brace armor->16 Pierce+burn payoff. Front-loaded with t1/t2 1s armor so Brace triggers reliably. All stamina (warrior 50 pool).

decks.label: Earth/Fire Bulwark vs loop15
decks.notes: Same bulwark core seen at a higher difficulty (1.1 mult) so Magmavow/Slag Maul/Stonepacer get a second data point. Tighter 10-card list to keep stamina economy honest.

decks.label: Reactive Bleed/Rage Wall (warrior)
decks.notes: Bramble Step (t3-agility-counter-defense) armor+Brace-bleed wall; Bloodtide Mend (t2-counter-water) self-bleed heal + Vengeance spi sustain; Vengeful Pyre (t3-counter-counter-fire) is the exhaust rage-doubler. Counter/Vengeance triggers fed by taking hits from doom_knight. All stamina (warrior).

decks.label: Reactive Bleed Wall vs loop15
decks.notes: Bramble Step + Bloodtide Mend reactive core at 1.1 mult for a second difficulty datapoint. Dropped the exhaust Vengeful Pyre here to keep a leaner sustain-focused list and isolate the bleed/heal cards.

decks.label: Elemental Armor-Control Hybrid (mage)
decks.notes: Centers the 'both'-resource T3 hybrids: Pyric Bulwark (armor->burn), Quickstone (armor+conditional haste), Searing Razor (burn+dex), Drowner's Dart (poison pierce attack win-con), Tidefoot Bloom (heal->poison engine, paired with t1-water Mend). Each costs only 1s+1m so the 60-mana mage pool plus a little stamina sustains them; cheap t1-fire/t1-water/t2-agility-fire openers front-loaded.

decks.label: Elemental Hybrid vs boss2 (iron_golem)
decks.notes: Same hybrid control core vs iron_golem (1.05 boss mult, defense-affinity armor ratchet) to stress the poison/burn DoT lines (Drowner's Dart, Searing Razor, Tidefoot Bloom) and the armor-haste survival cards (Pyric Bulwark, Quickstone) against a tanky boss at a second difficulty.
